commit_message:
[13.x] Document model-per-provider failover and failover-triggering exceptions (#11218)

* Update failover documentation in ai-sdk.md

The current Failover docs don't mention that a plain list of providers ignores the agent's #[Model] attribute and falls back to each provider's default model. This PR documents the associative-array form for specifying a model per provider, and lists which exceptions actually trigger failover.

* Update ai-sdk.md

---------

Co-authored-by: Taylor Otwell <taylor@laravel.com>
